title: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies Gameplay Map

subject.name: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies

narrative.description: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies (2013) is a acclaimed visual novel title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Investigate scenes, gather evidence, and present findings in courtroom confrontations.

mechanics.map_notes: Core courtroom cross examination loop defines Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies's identity.
mechanics.expression: Players press witness testimony and present evidence to expose contradictions in court.

mechanics.map_notes: Core narrative evidence presentation loop defines Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies's identity.
mechanics.expression: Collected clues are presented at key story beats to unlock new dialogue and areas.

mechanics.map_notes: Core branching investigation scenes loop defines Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies's identity.
mechanics.expression: Crime scenes and interviews branch based on evidence found and dialogue choices made.

mechanics.map_notes: Dialogue Choice Consequences supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: Conversation branches alter relationships, story flags, and available quests.

mechanics.map_notes: Optional Content Layering supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: Hidden rooms, passages, or content zones exist off main paths, requiring players to investigate suspicious environments.

mechanics.map_notes: Progress Gated Dungeon Completion supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: The player must fully complete self-contained dungeons, each with unique challenges, in order to unlock new areas or abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: Telegraphed Threat Loop supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: A combat encounter structure in which an enemy signals an incoming attack through a distinct visual or audio cue before the attack resolves.

mechanics.map_notes: Depletable Health Pool supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: A survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.

mechanics.map_notes: Bench Checkpoint supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: Designated rest points save progress, restore health or resources, and set respawn locations on death.

mechanics.map_notes: Mission Select Structure supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: A menu or hub lets the player choose missions or levels in flexible order with difficulty ratings.

mechanics.map_notes: Life Based Retry System supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: A failure-buffer system in which the player is granted a limited number of retries, losing one life upon failure and restarting from a previous checkpoint.

mechanics.map_notes: Mid Level Checkpoint supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: A save point within a stage resets the player to that position on death rather than restarting the entire level.

mechanics.map_notes: Patterned Boss Encounter supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: A boss fight design in which the enemy executes a deterministic or semi-deterministic set of behaviors including telegraphed attacks and movement routines.

mechanics.map_notes: Multi Phase Boss Battle supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: A combat structure where boss encounters transition through discrete stages with distinct attack patterns, behaviors, or environmental conditions when health thresholds are reached.

mechanics.map_notes: Environmental Trigger Switch supports the main loop in Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
mechanics.expression: A mechanic where the player interacts with a fixed element in the environment to produce a state change such as opening a door or activating a bridge.

design_intent.player_fantasy: A visual novel experience centered on Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies.
